title: Hematopoietic cell kinase activation in skeletal myocytes contributes to local inflammation and pain sensitization in myofascial trigger points.
snippet: Myofascial trigger points (MTrPs) are key pathological features of myofascial pain syndrome (MPS), and local inflammation is a key driver of their initiation and persistence. Hematopoietic cell kinase (HCK) is critical for the regulation of inflammation; however, its role in MTrPs remains unreported. The study was designed to characterize the expression pro...
